article.title: Microsoft Azure Unveils World’s First NVIDIA GB300 NVL72 Supercomputing Cluster for OpenAI

activityOfUser.occupation: Principal High-Performance Computing Backend Network Engineer

posts.text:
Microsoft and NVIDIA have just launched the world’s first production-scale GB300 NVL72 supercomputing cluster, designed for the most demanding reasoning and inference workloads.

This system redefines large-scale inference — 4,600+ NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra GPUs, 37 TB of unified memory, and NVIDIA Quantum-X800 InfiniBand networking that connects every GPU and CPU at massive scale with near-zero latency. Together, they unlock the performance OpenAI’s next-generation models demand.

#OpenAI #Azure #Microsoft #NVIDIA

posts.text:
Our team at Microsoft Azure is expanding! We are currently seeking talented individuals to fill several key roles in our Supercomputing and AI Workloads teams. If you are looking to take the next step in your career, consider applying for these exciting opportunities:

🌟 Supercomputing Team Lead: 
Join us in leading innovative supercomputing projects at Microsoft Azure. Apply here: https://lnkd.in/ggKGru_4

🌟 Senior Supercomputing Engineer: 
Become a vital part of our supercomputing team by applying for this senior engineer position: https://lnkd.in/gabZh9Z3

🌟 AI Workloads Team Lead: 
Lead groundbreaking AI projects by joining our AI Workloads team. Apply now: https://lnkd.in/gNpnrXuN

🌟 Principal AI/HPC Software Engineer: 
Bring your expertise to our team as a Principal AI/HPC Software Engineer. Apply here: https://lnkd.in/gXi2aXTf

Don't miss this opportunity to be part of cutting-edge projects and make a significant impact in the world of supercomputing and AI. Apply today and join us in shaping the future of technology at Microsoft Azure!

posts.text:
Job Alert!! 🚨 Exciting opportunities ahead! We are currently hiring for multiple roles at our Data Center sites across the USA. Join us at our hiring events in September at Boydton, Phoenix, Dulles, San Antonio, Des Moines, and Atlanta for positions like Data Center Technician, Critical Environment Technician and Data Center Inventory & Asset Technician. Don't miss out on this chance to be part of our dynamic team!

If interested, you can apply directly on Microsoft Career Portal. 

 #JobOpportunity #HiringEvent #DataCenter #TechnicianRoles 🌟

posts.text:
At Azure, we're doing a lot of amazing, cutting-edge interconnect work with a variety of technologies including InfiniBand, Ultra-Ethernet, and more, and we need a lot of help making this all happen. 

In just the past few days, I've seen Jithin Jose and Torsten Hoefler post about opportunities on the teams they work on:
- https://lnkd.in/e4825EfV
- https://lnkd.in/e-Qi_eJk

If you're an network architect, software engineer, or just love working with cutting edge high performance interconnects, apply at the links in these posts or search the Microsoft careers site (https://lnkd.in/eUnNjQuB) to apply today and help us build the next generation of the world's largest, fastest #AI and #HPC systems.
